omopColumns.name: nhs_number
omopColumns.query:
select distinct
    Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber,
    Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed,
    Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreClinicalNurseSpecialistAndRiskFactorAssessments.SmokingStatusCode.@code' as SmokingStatusCancer
from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81
where type = 'UR'
  and NhsNumber is not null
  and SmokingStatusCancer is not null
  and DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed is not null;

omopColumns.name: observation_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `43054909`. Tobacco smoking status

omopColumns.name: observation_date

dataSource.name: DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed
dataSource.description: The date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was clinically agreed.

origins.origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)
